entries.title: SLA Pulse Monitor
entries.notes: Injects live timers into Zendesk/Intercom/HubSpot ticket views. Built with MutationObserver to track ticket state changes. Per-seat SaaS bridges to existing helpdesk APIs.
entries.pain: Support reps miss SLA deadlines because they lack real-time countdown visibility on tickets.

entries.title: Screenshot Metadata Stripper
entries.notes: Strips EXIF/XMP metadata before download or clipboard copy. Uses Canvas API re-encoding for zero-server processing. Simple one-click toggle, no friction.
entries.pain: People accidentally expose device names, timestamps, and GPS coords when sharing screenshots.

entries.title: Dependency Diff Viewer
entries.notes: Parses package-lock changes, fetches changelogs, shows semantic diff summary inline on GitHub PRs. Builds in 2-3 weeks with simple API calls to npm registry.
entries.pain: Code reviewers waste time hunting changelogs to understand what an npm/yarn update actually modifies.

entries.title: Figma CSS Snippet Fetcher
entries.notes: Uses Figma's plugin API to extract styles from selected frames, outputs Tailwind/CSS/React Native. Freemium with export limits, then per-seat unlock.
entries.pain: Frontend devs manually translate Figma styles to CSS, losing time on repetitive styling work.

entries.title: Cold Email Template Tester
entries.notes: Renders email templates in iframe sandboxes simulating each client. Offers spam score proxy via regex heuristics. Quota-based: 10 free previews/month.
entries.pain: Outreach teams can't preview how their emails render across Gmail, Outlook, and Apple Mail before sending.

entries.title: LLM Prompt Cost Calculator
entries.notes: Parses API responses to estimate token counts and multiplies by current pricing. No backend needed—calculates client-side. Useful for freelancers billing clients.
entries.pain: Users running many AI conversations lose track of how much they're spending across ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini.

entries.title: Confluence Staleness Detector
entries.notes: Overlays green/yellow/red freshness indicators on Confluence pages based on last-edit age and Jira ticket links. Uses Confluence REST API, ship in under a week.
entries.pain: Engineers waste hours following outdated runbooks because docs don't show when they were last updated.

entries.title: Gmail Thread Unsubscriber
entries.notes: Adds one-click unsubscribe buttons to Gmail threads using list-unsubscribe headers. Shows bulk unsubscribe dashboard. Bridges to SendGrid/Mailchimp for power users.
entries.pain: Managing email unsubscriptions requires clicking through multiple pages and confirming in email clients.

entries.title: Schema Registry Checker
entries.notes: Validates JSON schemas against a registry (Kafka Schema Registry, AWS Glue) before deploys. Browser-side overlay in GitHub/GitLab diff views. Simple REST client, quick to build.
entries.pain: Backend devs push breaking schema changes and only find out after integration tests fail.

entries.title: Sales Deck Version Auditor
entries.notes: Watches Google Slides/Canva decks for version changes, pushes Slack/email alerts when decks update. Auto-renames files with version stamps. Freemium for solo reps.
entries.pain: Sales reps accidentally send outdated decks to prospects, damaging credibility in deals.
